get.description:
List Collections. Get a list of collections.

Use the name query param to list the collections whose display name CONTAINS IGNORECASE the given search string. Use the categoryIds param to get a list of collections whose ids match those listed in the comma delimted string value. Either categoryIds or name must be provided.

Optionally takes the x-ccasset-language header to get translated content in another language.

To get the list of included/excluded collections, use a group of {promotionId, itemTypeList and templateValue} parameters together.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description:
A SCIM filter string for selecting a subset of            all collections. See [https://tools.ietf            .org/html/draft-ietf-scim-api-12#section-3.2.2](https://tools          .ietf.org/html/draft-ietf-scim-api-12#section-3.2.2)section 3.2.2.2          of the SCIM specification for details on the SCIM filter format          .
Examples:
Get all collections whose displayName contains          shirt: q=displayName co "shirt"
Get all child collections for          collection with id shoes: q=fixedParentCategories co          "shoes"
Text, date and time values appearing in SCIM filters          should be quoted, with date and time values using ISO-8601 format.          Numeric and boolean values should not be quoted.
The following          collection properties can be used in a q query:
 *          categoryImages
 * creationDate
 * description
 *          displayName
 * fixedParentCategories
 * id
 * longDescription
 * fixedChildProducts

parameters.description: Return response with paginated pattern

parameters.name: depth
parameters.description: Depth of search, can only be set to 'min' which is set to 2. This parameter can only be used with categoryIds and by default depth is set to 4.

parameters.description: Only return active categories when it is true, when set to false or by default, returns all the categories

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Partial display name or id of a collection.

parameters.name: itemTypeList
parameters.description: Type of collection list to be fetched from the given promotion id -includedCategories or excludedCategories

parameters.name: templateValue
parameters.description: Template value to fetch the included/excluded collection list from - e.g PSC_Value

parameters.name: promotionId
parameters.description: Promotion id to fetch the included/excluded collection list from, if promotionId is included then include the itemTypeList and templateValue parameters to get the include/exclude collection list for the promotion

parameters.name: continueOnMissingCategory
parameters.description: boolean flag to determine whether to continue if a category is missing.

To get the list of included/excluded Products in a promotion, use a group of {promotionId, itemTypeList and templateValue} parameters together.

parameters.description: Return response with paginated pattern, to be used with query params - name/productIds/promotion group {promotionId, itemTypeList, templateValue}

parameters.description: Boolean indicating if the translations property should be returned for each item in the response.

parameters.description: Show inventory quantity.

parameters.name: itemTypeList
parameters.description: Type of product list to be fetched from the given promotion id -includedProducts or excludedProducts

parameters.name: templateValue
parameters.description: UI Template value to fetch the included/excluded product list from - e.g PSC_Value, optional_offer_psc_value etc

parameters.name: unassigned
parameters.description: Restrict response to unassigned products (ignore categoryId).

parameters.name: promotionId
parameters.description: Promotion id to fetch the included/excluded product list from. if promotionId is included then include the itemTypeList and templateValue parameters to get the include/exclude product list for the promotion

parameters.name: showInactiveProducts
parameters.description: Boolean flag to determine whether to include inactive products as part of the result.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description:
A SCIM filter string for selecting a subset of all products. See [https://tools.ietf.org/html/draft-ietf-scim-api-12#section-3.2.2](https://tools.ietf.org/html/draft-ietf-scim-api-12#section-3.2.2)section 3.2.2.2 of the SCIM specification for details on the SCIM filter format.
Examples:
Get all products whose displayName contains shirt: q=displayName co "shirt"
Get all products with an orderLimit between 5 and 10: q=orderLimit gt 5 and orderLimit lt 10
Text, date and time values appearing in SCIM filters should be quoted, with date and time values using ISO-8601 format. Numeric and boolean values should not be quoted.
The following base product properties can be used in a q query:
 * avgCustRating
 * brand
 * childSKUs
 * description
 * displayName
 * id
 * largeImage
 * longDescription
 * notForIndividualSale
 * orderLimit
 * productImages
 * smallImage
Additionally, custom product properties may also be used in a q query.

parameters.name: expand
parameters.description: Boolean indicating if the expanded product information should be returned.

parameters.name: catalogId
parameters.description: ID of the catalog.

parameters.name: priceListGroupId
parameters.description: Price list group id for adding the prices to the product in the response.

parameters.name: productIds
parameters.description: Product IDs to list.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Partial displayName of a product to use for search.

parameters.name: continueOnMissingProduct
parameters.description: boolean flag to determine whether to continue if a product is missing.

parameters.name: minimalList
parameters.description: Returns a minimal set of properties.  Adds two properties, onSale and priceRange, so that those two values do not need to be computed by the client. get.description:
List Promotions. Get a list of promotions including support for pagination and sorting.

The following query params cannot be used together: name and promotionId.

200.description: Following model is returned when operation succeeds.

default.description:
The error response.
 The following are the internal error codes thrown by this API when the request processing fails in Oracle Commerce Cloud:


|Error Code|Description|
|------------------|------------------|
|21015|Invalid value for the promotionType parameter: {0}.|
|21014|This is an unsupported enabledState: {0}.|
|21001|Promotion not found for the given id: invalidPromotionId.|
|21012|The template filter is improperly formatted: {0}.|
|21011|There is no promotion item type of type {0}.|
|21010|Cannot list promotions with a blank item type.|
|21241|promotion folder not found for the given ID : nonExistingId|
|21174|propertyName is a required property for this request.|
|21240|Promotion folder ID is blank|
|21173|propertyName can only be excludedPromotions for this request.|
|21170|id is a required property for this request.|
|21019|Internal Error.|

parameters.name: promotionType
parameters.description: Filters the results using a specific promotion type. This can be one of three values: item, order, shipping. These can be a comma-separated list (e.g., promotionType=item,order).

parameters.name: itemType
parameters.description:
Type of repository item on which the list of referenced promotions is to be fetched. This parameter must be used with id and propertyName to fetch a list of promotions with stacking rule matching the id.

 It's value can be 'stackingRule or 'promotion'. If this property is skipped, then by default it is considered as 'promotion' type

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Index of the first element to return.

parameters.name: templateFilter
parameters.description: Filters the results using a specific template key in the format of type.name.  E.g., item.getItemDiscount.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description:
Sorting criteria. Following are the fields supported by this param: 

|Field|Type|Description|
|------------------|------------------|------------------|
|property|string|The property the listing is sorted by.|
|order|string|Sort order: asc or desc.|

parameters.name: promotionId
parameters.description: A filter string that will return partial matches on ID or displayName.  This returns ALL promotions, no paging, no limit.

parameters.name: enabledState
parameters.description: One of three values: enabled, disabled, both.  This will return promotions that are enabled, disabled, or both enabled and disabled.

parameters.name: total
parameters.description: The total number of items.

parameters.name: folder
parameters.description: Filters the promotions using a specific promotion folder id. All the promotions whose parentfolder is assigned to the provided id can be retrieved through the folder parameter.

parameters.name: propertyName
parameters.description:
Property name that stores a list of promotions on a given item id - e.g. 'excludedPromotions' on a promotion matching id param, or 'promotions' on a stacking rule. 

 This parameter should be used with id parameter that is either repositoryId of a promotion or a stacking rule. If used with id and itemType then it is the property of a repository Item of type itemType.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The number of items to return.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: This is a search filter value that will find promotions that match on the ID or display name.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description:
If id used only with propertyName, then it is promotion's repository id to fetch the included/excluded promotions list on that promotion.

 If id is combined with itemType=stackingRule and propertyName=promotions, it returns the list of promotions with stacking rule matching the id.

application/json.description: The details of order created on the Oracle Commerce Cloud. The order includes item and shipment details
application/json.title: orders

links.title: This operation posts the details of an order

taxPriceInfo.description: The tax pricing details for the order.

cityTax.description: The monetary amount of city tax.

countyTax.description: The monetary amount of county tax.

currencyCode.description: The three character currency code.

countryTax.description: The monetary amount of country tax.

shippingGroups.description: Shipping groups represent shipments and include commerceItemRelationships that represent which commerce items in what quantity are included in the shipment. Shipping groups in a request are matched to existing shipping groups by id, followed by description, followed by (for hardgoodShippingGroups) shippingMethod + address.

description.description: The description of this shipping group. Defaults to the ID.

submittedDate.description: The date the shipping group was submitted.

priceInfo.description: The pricing details about this shipping group.

rawShipping.description: The monitary amount of the cost of raw shipping.

currencyCode.description: The currency code for the monetary amounts.

shipOnDate.description: The date this shipping group is expected to ship upon.

actualShipDate.description: The actual shipped date of this shipping group.

specialInstructions.description: Special instructions for the shipping group. Keys and values are strings.

shippingAddress.description: The shipping address for this shipping group.

lastName.description: Last name.

country.description: Country.

address2.description: Address Line 2.

city.description: City.

address1.description: Address Line 1.

companyName.description: Company name.

postalCode.description: Postal code.

county.description: Name of the county.

ownerId.description: The ID of the owner of this address.

firstName.description: First name.

phoneNumber.description: Phone number.

state.description: State.

email.description: The email address

commerceItemRelationships.description: The commerce item relationships are instances of ShippingGroupCommerceItemRelationship that represent how many of which commerce items are included in the order. Please see caution in description of update order. Existing commerce items relationships are matched to input data by id, followed by commerceItemId, followed by commerceItemExternalId.

commerceItemId.description: The referenced commerce item's internal ID.

quantity.description: The quantity of items referenced by this relationship.

relationshipType.description: The type of this relationship. SHIPPINGQUANITY or SHIPPINGQUANTITYREMAINING.

returnedQuantity.description: Number of referenced items that were returned.

commerceItemExternalId.description: The referenced commerce item's external ID.

id.description: The native ID of this item.
The ID of this shipping group.

state.description: The state of this shipping group.

stateDetail.description: Details about the state of this shipping group.

trackingNumber.description: The tracking number. In case of multiple tracking numbers the format should be carrierId-trackingNumber,carrierId-trackingNumber..., Here carrierId is the Id which has been added through the addCarrier end point.

shippingGroupClassType.description: The class type for the ShippingGroup. Currently must be "hardgoodShippingGroup".

lastName.description: Last name.

firstName.description: First name.

shippingAddress.description: Default shipping address

country.description: Country.

phoneNumber.description: Phone number.

address2.description: Address Line 2.

city.description: City.

address1.description: Address Line 1.

postalCode.description: Postal code.

county.description: Name of the county.

state.description: State.

email.description: The email address

shippingGroupCount.description: The number of shipping groups (read-only, value is ignored when updating).

paymentGroups.description: The array of payment groups represent the payment(s) that paid for the order. Orders when placed will have an instance of a CyberSource TokenizedCreditCard (paymentGroupClassType and paymentMethod of "tokenizedCreditCard"). The paymentGroups property can be updated to include instances of ExternalPaymentGroup (paymentGroupClassType and paymentMethod of "externalPaymentGroup"). ExternalPaymentGroups represent methods of payment that are external and opaque to cloud commerce, and which were taken after the order was initially placed.

expirationYear.description: A string containing the two or four digit year when the credit card expires. (only only for TokenizedCreditCards)

externalType.description: The type in the external system. Might be "StoreCredit", "CreditCard", "Check", etc. (only for ExternalPaymentGroups).

amount.description: The monetary amount of the payment.

externalId.description: The ID for the payment group in an external system (like the OMS)

expirationMonth.description: A string containing the two digit month when the credit card expires. (only only for TokenizedCreditCards)

creditCardType.description: The type of the credit card. (only for TokenizedCreditCards)

submittedDate.description: The date the payment was submitted.

token.description: The CyberSource token string. (only for tokenizedCreditCard)

paymentGroupClassType.description: The class type of the payment group. Currently supported values are "tokenizedCreditCard" and "externalPaymentGroup".

creditCardNumber.description: The last four digits of the credit card number. (only for TokenizedCreditCards)

externalSubtype.description: The subtype in the external system. Might be "VISA" for a PaymentGroup with an external type of "CreditCard". (only for ExternalPaymentGroups)

paymentMethod.description: The payment method. Currently supported values are "tokenizedCreditCard" and "externalPaymentGroup".

externalSourceId.description: The external source ID, limited to 6 characters. (only for ExternalPaymentGroups)

state.description: The state of this payment group.

id.description: The internal ID of the payment group.

stateDetail.description: Details about the state of this payment group.

currencyCode.description: The three character currency code. For example: USD.

expirationDayOfMonth.description: A string containing the two digit day of month when the credit card expires. (only only for TokenizedCreditCards)

salesChannel.description: The sales channel of this order. default to "default".

paymentGroupCount.description: The number of payment groups. (read-only, value is ignored when updating)

priceInfo.description: Pricing information, an instance of OrderPriceInfo.

total.description: The monetary total: amount + shipping + tax. (read-only)

manualAdjustmentTotal.description: The monetary total of manual adjustments.

discountAmount.description: The monetary amount of the discount: rawSubtotal - amount + manualAdjustmentTotal. (read-only)

currencyCode.description: The three character currency code for the monetary amounts.

profileId.description: The ID of the shopper profile that owns the order.

siteId.description: The ID of the site on which the order was placed.

totalCommerceItemCount.description: The total count of commerce items in the order. (read-only)

state.description: The state of the order.

commerceItems.description: The commerce items (sometimes referred to as "line items") represent which actual skus are included in thef order in what quantity, and related information. Please see caution in description of update order. Existing commerce items are matched to input data by externalId, followed by id, followed by catalogRefId. The elements in the commerceItem are instances of CommerceItemImpl.

amount.description: The monetary amount of this order.

priceListId.description: The price list ID used for pricing.

shippingSurcharge.description: Extra handling cost for shipping the product.

currencyCode.description: The currency code for the monetary amounts. A three character currency code such as USD.

quantity.description: The number of items covered by this price info

range.description: Represents which specific items are covered by this price info.

lowBound.description: The lower bound of the range this price info covers, inclusive.

highBound.description: The upper bound of the range this price info covers.

size.description: The number of items in this range, inclusive. (read-only)

detailedUnitPrice.description: The detailed unit price: amount / quantity. (read-only)

currencyCode.description: The three character currency code for the monetary amounts.

listPrice.description: The monetary amount of the list price.

catalogId.description: The ID of the catalog which this commerce item references.

productDisplayName.description: The product's display name. (read-only, obtained from the referenced product)

catalogKey.description: The key of the catalog this commerce item references.

externalId.description: An optional, external ID for this commerce item.

id.description: The internal/native ID for this commerce item.

state.description: The state of this commerce item. (read-only, calculated from shippingGroups' commerceItemRelationships)

stateDetail.description: Details about the state of this commerce item.

catalogRefId.description: The reference ID of the catalog this commerce item references. Typically the SKU id.

Its a Boolean parameter.
if its value is true then it includes all b2b sites in the response.

notNullContracts - returns sites only with not null contracts.

200.description: Following model is returned when operation succeeds.

default.description: The error response

parameters.name: includeArchives
parameters.description: Include entries from archived log files?

parameters.name: queryText
parameters.description: Limit the returned error messages to those containing the query text. (Case sensitive)

parameters.name: until
parameters.description:
Either 
 0. An ISO-8601 formatted string. 
 0. A millisecond timestamp value. representing the 'to' date and time to be used when querying the logs

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: 'clientErrors' is the only type currently supported

parameters.name: localLogs
parameters.description: Read from the local logs on the Admin server, rather than collate the logs from the Store servers. Useful for returning errors from Storefront Preview.

parameters.name: since
parameters.description:
Either 
 0. An ISO-8601 formatted string. 
 0. A millisecond timestamp value. representing the 'from' date and time to be used when querying the logs.

parameters.name: numArchiveFiles
parameters.description: The number of previous archived log files to be queried. (0 = unlimited). Defaults to 7 archive files.

put.description:
Update Collection. Update a collection by ID.   **Requires the x-ccasset-language header so translated content can be set for a specific language.**         

         Update childProducts property:
         Set the type property to either appendProducts or updateProducts to update the child products of a collection.
         EXAMPLE INPUT:
         Remove prod1, prod2 and prod3
         {'op': 'remove', 'products': ['prod1', 'prod2', 'prod3]}
         
         Move the group of products at indices 5-10 (inclusive) to appear starting at index 2
         (shorthand for 'move product 5 to index 2, product 6 to index 3, etc.')
         {'op': 'move', 'fromStart': 5, 'fromEnd': 10, 'to' : 2}

post.description: Audience Sizes. Given an ordered list of Audience Rules, retrieve an ordered list of registered shopper counts as if those rules were executed in combination with all previous rules in the order given (i.e. rule 1 count, rule 1 & 2 count, etc...). Note that the ruleSet operator will determine whether the counts increase or decrease: "any" will make the counts increase as more rules are considered and "all" will make the counts decrease.  The endpoint also returns the total estimated number of registered shoppers in the system.

200.description: Following model is returned when operation succeeds.

default.description:
The error response.

offer_psc_value.description: The offer product set criteria values

optional_offer_psc_value.description: The offer product set criteria values

sameAsCondition.description: Items to include and exclude for offer are the same as items in buy condition

no_of_items_to_discount.description: The number of items to discount

gwpItem.description: The gift with promotion configuration details

giftId.description: The product id of the gift item

autoRemove.description: Whether to remove item from cart when cart no longer meets buy condition

no_of_items_to_buy.description: The number of items to buy

sites.description: This will limit the promotion to being applicable only to the 1+ specified sites.  An empty array means the promotion applies to all sites.

repositoryId.description: The ID of a site associated with the promotion.

priority.description: The priority of this promotion over other promotions

templatePath.description: The path to the promotion template.

enabled.description: Whether or not the promotion is currently enabled.

cardIINRanges.description: List of issuer identification numbers including wildcards and ranges for which the promotion should be applied.

excludedPromotions.description: List of promotions to be excluded from the current promotion. Item promotions can exclude promotions of type: item, order, shipping. Order promotions can exclude promotion of type order and shipping. Shipping promotions can only exclude another shipping promotions.

parentFolder.description: Map of promotion folder's repository ID key and value. In order to have no folder assignment, set parentFolder to null e.g. "parentFolder": null or skip the property completely.

templateName.description: The name of the promotion template to use.

shippingMethods.description: Shipping Methods for which the promotion should be applied

example.description: Spend $100 today and get 10% off your order!

rollUpCount.description: maximum number for messages after which rollup should trigger .

maxCount.description: maximum number for messages to retain,

age.description: Age in minutes after which the messages will be purged

maxCount.description: maximum number for messages to retain,

age.description: Age in minutes after which the messages will be purged

productTypeId.description: The ID of the product type.

guestCheckoutEnabled.description: Applies the authorization for anonymous shoppers to sign-in to complete checkout.

numberOfPreviousPasswords.description: password should not have been used as previous N passwords for the given shopper user.

numberOfPreviousPasswordsMinVal.description: Minimum number of previous passwords to be stored for the given shopper user.

passwordExpirationLengthMinVal.description: minimum number of days after which the current password of the shopper will automatically expire..

sessionTimeoutLength.description: Timeout duration for all shopper sessions.

cannotUsePreviousPasswords.description: Applies the previous password usage constraint.

passwordExpirationLength.description: number of days after which the current password of the shopper will automatically expire.

minPasswordLengthMinVal.description: Minimum value of minimum length of the password.

sessionTimeoutEnabled.description: Applies the session timeout length constraint.

minPasswordLengthMaxVal.description: Maximum value of minimum length of the password.

useCase.description: Applies the usage of capital letters in user password..

cannotUseUsername.description: Password must not be the same as their Username.

useMinPasswordLength.description: Applies the minimum password length constraint.

numberOfPreviousPasswordsMaxVal.description: Maximum number of previous passwords to be stored for the given shopper user.

blockCommonPasswords.description: Block the Use of Commonly Chosen Passwords and Weak Passphrases.

sessionTimeoutLengthMinVal.description: Minimum timeout length for the user session.

sessionTimeoutLengthMaxVal.description: Maximum timeout length for the user session.

useSymbol.description: Applies the usage of symbol in user password.

total.description: Total number of changes published. Deprecated.

limit.description: Limit of number of changes.

sort.description: Sort information of the publishing changes.

property.description: Property of changes say display name.

lastName.description: Last Name the of Author of publishing changes.

changeType.description: Change type of publishing changes. 0: UPDATE, 1: DELETE, 2: CREATE.

assetTypeDisplayName.description: Asset type display name of publishing changes.

firstName.description: First Name of the Author of publishing changes.

parentAssetType.description: Parent asset type of publishing changes.

locale.description: The locale in which order submitted.

commerceItems.description: The commerce items (sometimes referred to as "line items") represent which actual skus are included in thef order in what quantity, and related information. Please see caution in description of update order. Existing commerce items are matched to input data by externalId, followed by id, followed by catalogRefId. The elements in the commerceItem are instances of CommerceItemImpl.

externalId.description: An optional, external ID for this commerce item.

externalData.description: External data to be associated with a commerce item, provided by a CPQ system.

values.description: The array of values associated with an externalData item.

dynamic_property_key.description: This property's name and value will be retrieved from a CPQ system, so will be dynamically set.

actionCode.description: The action code that has been set on the externalData item by the CPQ system.

shippingSurcharge.description: Extra handling cost for shipping the product.

quantity.description: The number of items covered by this price info

range.description: Represents which specific items are covered by this price info.

lowBound.description: The lower bound of the range this price info covers, inclusive.

highBound.description: The upper bound of the range this price info covers.

size.description: The number of items in this range, inclusive. (read-only)

detailedUnitPrice.description: The detailed unit price: amount / quantity. (read-only)

listPrice.description: The monetary amount of the list price.

dateTime.description: Timestamp to schedule the publish operation. Not valid when operationType is selective_publish

maxWaitMinutes.description: Number of minutes to wait for the publishing lock that may be held by another long-running operation, such as an import.

tokenID.description: TokenID to represent the list of change item IDs to use for selective publishing

operationType.description: Type of publish operation to perform. one of publish, full_publish or selective_publish

name.description: The name of the previously uploaded extension.

emailSMTPPort.description: Port to use to communicate with the SMTP host.

emailServiceType.description: Must be BASIC, SMTP or CNS (Oracle Cloud Notification Service).

emailSMTPPassword.description: User password for the SMTP server.

emailSMTPAuthMethod.description: The SMTP Authorisation method - either SSL or TLS.

emailSMTPUsername.description: User login for the SMTP server.

isOnsEnabled.description: Whether ONS (Oracle Notification Service) is enabled

recommendationsSupported.description: true - product recommendations are supported, false - product recommendations are not supported

verificationStatus.description: 0 - Not applicable (BASIC/SMTP) 1 - Status not verified,2 - Status pending verification or 3 Status Verified

enabled.description: true - this notification is enabled and an email will be sent out, false - disable no email sent when triggered

recommendationsAllowAnyStrategy.description: true - any recommendations strategy (e.g. Blended, Top Sellers, Bought Together, Browsed Together) can be used, false - only specific recommendation strategies are permitted

recommendationsAllowRestrictions.description: true - allow restrictions (such as 'in-brand' or 'in-category' to be applied to the recommendation strategy, false - don't allow restrictions to be applied to the recommendation strategy

includeRecommendations.description: true - product recommendations will be included in the email, false - product recommendations will not be included in the email

numberOfRecommendations.description: Number of product recommendations to include in email

recommendationsPermittedStrategies.description: Array of recommendation strategy keys permitted for this notification type

priceListGroupList.description: List of Price List Groups associated with the site including default Price List Group

productionURL.description: The production base url for storefront. If set, this base url will be used for any absolute generated links e.g. sitemap urls

siteTypes.description: List of site types supported by this site

name.description: Site name.

timezoneLabel.description: Timezone name to display in the UI

progress.description: The current progress of the process.

completed.description: Flag indicating whether process is completed or not.

error.description: Error detail of the original request.

type.description: Absolute URI that identifies the problem type.

requestStatus.description: HTTP status code of the original request.

headers.description: Map of header names and header values

secretKey.description: The base64 encoded secret key of the WebHook. Will be null unless includeSecretKeys query parameter is true. A secret key is currently shared between WebHooks of the same name (like "calculateShipping").

displayName.description: The display name of the WebHook.

serverType.description: The server type of the WebHook.

name.description: The simple name of the WebHook.

url.description: The target URL for the function WebHook.

pricingScheme.description: Pricing Scheme

levels.description: Levels

listPrice.description: List price

priceList.description: The price list for this price

resend.description: The boolean that specifies whether the messages should be queued for resend.

occurrences.description: The occurence of the day or days of the week on which the schedule occurs. Not used if parseString is specified. If neither parseString or occurences is specified, defaults to all occurences in the month (equivalent to "*").

hours.description: The hours of the day on which the schedule occurs. Not used if parseString is specified. If neither parseString nor hours is specified, defaults to all hours of the day (equivalent to "*").

months.description: The month or months on which the schedule occurs. Not used if parseString is specified. If neither parseString or months is specified, defaults to all months (equivalent to "*").

parseString.description: The complete atg.service.scheduler.CalendarSchedule parse string. If present, will be used instead of hours, minutes, etc. A null parseString value will delete the baseline schedule

minutes.description: The minutes of the hour on which the schedule occurs. Not used if parseString is specified. If neither parseString nor minutes is specified, defaults to all minutes of the hour (equivalent to "*").

daysOfMonth.description: The day or days of the month on which the schedule occurs. Not used if parseString is specified. If neither parseString or daysOfMonth is specified, defaults to all days of the month (equivalent to "*").

timeZone.description: The optional time zone to use when interpretting the schedule. If not specified, defaults to the time zone of the server JVM.

locale.description: The optional locale to use. Defaults to the US locale.

daysOfWeek.description: The day or days of the week on which the schedule occurs. Not used if parseString is specified. If neither parseString nor daysOfWeek is specified, defaults to all days of the the week (equivalent to "*").

indexingJob.description: The overall state information of indexing job.

finishTime.description: The finish time for the job in milliseconds.

forcedToBaseline.description: Whether this is forced to baseline.

startTime.description: The start time for the job in milliseconds.

baseline.description: Whether this is a baseline index. True means baseline, false means partial.

phases.description: An indexing job is made up of indexing phases, which in turn create indexing tasks.

finishTime.description: The finish time for the phase in milliseconds.

startTime.description: The start time for the phase in milliseconds.

tasks.description: Tasks involved in the indexing job.

supportsStatusCounts.description: Whether supports status count was enabled

indexablePath.description: The Nucleus path of indexable component.

status.description: The overall status of the job.

historyItems.description: Repository items representing the indexing job history.

repositoryId.description: The repository id of history item.

maxUses.description: Specifies the number of uses a coupon has.  This is sent if 'useMaxUses' in the request is set to true.

promotions.description: List of promotions associated with the coupon.

prefix.description: If the coupon is a batch coupon and if 'useMaxUses' in the request is set to true then prefix for the batch coupon is sent in the reponse.

id.description: The ID of the coupon.This is sent if 'useMaxUses' in the request is set to true.

links.description: The links referring to this response, and any applicable next or previous parts of the response. This is based on the total results, limit, and offset.

cityTax.description: The monetary amount of city tax.

countryTax.description: The monetary amount of country tax.

shippingGroups.description: Shipping groups represent shipments and include commerceItemRelationships that represent which commerce items in what quantity are included in the shipment. Shipping groups in a request are matched to existing shipping groups by id, followed by description, followed by (for hardgoodShippingGroups) shippingMethod + address.

description.description: The description of this shipping group. Defaults to the ID.

submittedDate.description: The date the shipping group was submitted.

priceInfo.description: The pricing details about this shipping group.

rawShipping.description: The monitary amount of the cost of raw shipping.

currencyCode.description: The currency code for the monetary amounts.

shipOnDate.description: The date this shipping group is expected to ship upon.

actualShipDate.description: The actual shipped date of this shipping group.

specialInstructions.description: Special instructions for the shipping group. Keys and values are strings.

shippingAddress.description: The shipping address for this shipping group.

country.description: Country.

lastName.description: Last name.

address2.description: Address Line 2.

city.description: City.

address1.description: Address Line 1.

companyName.description: Company name.

postalCode.description: Postal code.

county.description: Name of the county.

ownerId.description: The ID of the owner of this address.

firstName.description: First name.

phoneNumber.description: Phone number.

state.description: State.

email.description: The email address

commerceItemRelationships.description: The commerce item relationships are instances of ShippingGroupCommerceItemRelationship that represent how many of which commerce items are included in the order. Please see caution in description of update order. Existing commerce items relationships are matched to input data by id, followed by commerceItemId, followed by commerceItemExternalId.

commerceItemId.description: The referenced commerce item's internal ID.

quantity.description: The quantity of items referenced by this relationship.

relationshipType.description: The type of this relationship. SHIPPINGQUANITY or SHIPPINGQUANTITYREMAINING.

returnedQuantity.description: Number of referenced items that were returned.

commerceItemExternalId.description: The referenced commerce item's external ID.

id.description: The native ID of this item.

state.description: The state of this shipping group.

stateDetail.description: Details about the state of this shipping group.

trackingNumber.description: The tracking number. In case of multiple tracking numbers the format should be carrierId-trackingNumber,carrierId-trackingNumber..., Here carrierId is the Id which has been added through the addCarrier end point.

shippingGroupClassType.description: The class type for the ShippingGroup. Currently must be "hardgoodShippingGroup".

priceGroupId.description: The ID of the price group to which the order belongs.

taxExempt.description: Whether order is tax-exempt or not.

sourceSystem.description: The system where the order originated.

externalPrice.description: External price for this order

paymentGroups.description: The array of payment groups represent the payment(s) that paid for the order. Orders when placed will have an instance of a CyberSource TokenizedCreditCard (paymentGroupClassType and paymentMethod of "tokenizedCreditCard"). The paymentGroups property can be updated to include instances of ExternalPaymentGroup (paymentGroupClassType and paymentMethod of "externalPaymentGroup"). ExternalPaymentGroups represent methods of payment that are external and opaque to cloud commerce, and which were taken after the order was initially placed.

expirationYear.description: A string containing the two or four digit year when the credit card expires. (only only for TokenizedCreditCards)

externalType.description: The type in the external system. Might be "StoreCredit", "CreditCard", "Check", etc. (only for ExternalPaymentGroups).

amount.description: The monetary amount of the payment.

externalId.description: The ID for the payment group in an external system (like the OMS)

creditCardType.description: The type of the credit card. (only for TokenizedCreditCards)

expirationMonth.description: A string containing the two digit month when the credit card expires. (only only for TokenizedCreditCards)

submittedDate.description: The date the payment was submitted.

token.description: The CyberSource token string. (only for tokenizedCreditCard)

paymentGroupClassType.description: The class type of the payment group. Currently supported values are "tokenizedCreditCard" and "externalPaymentGroup".

creditCardNumber.description: The last four digits of the credit card number. (only for TokenizedCreditCards)

externalSubtype.description: The subtype in the external system. Might be "VISA" for a PaymentGroup with an external type of "CreditCard". (only for ExternalPaymentGroups)

paymentMethod.description: The payment method. Currently supported values are "tokenizedCreditCard" and "externalPaymentGroup".

externalSourceId.description: The external source ID, limited to 6 characters. (only for ExternalPaymentGroups)

id.description: The internal ID of the payment group.

state.description: The state of this payment group.

stateDetail.description: Details about the state of this payment group.

currencyCode.description: The three character currency code. For example: USD.

expirationDayOfMonth.description: A string containing the two digit day of month when the credit card expires. (only only for TokenizedCreditCards)

salesChannel.description: The sales channel of this order. default to "default".

shippingGroupCount.description: The number of shipping groups (read-only, value is ignored when updating).

locale.description: The locale in which order submitted.

paymentGroupCount.description: The number of payment groups. (read-only, value is ignored when updating)

priceInfo.description: Pricing information, an instance of OrderPriceInfo.

total.description: The monetary total: amount + shipping + tax. (read-only)

manualAdjustmentTotal.description: The monetary total of manual adjustments.

discountAmount.description: The monetary amount of the discount: rawSubtotal - amount + manualAdjustmentTotal. (read-only)

currencyCode.description: The three character currency code for the monetary amounts.

profileId.description: The ID of the shopper profile that owns the order.

siteId.description: The ID of the site on which the order was placed.

totalCommerceItemCount.description: The total count of commerce items in the order. (read-only)

state.description: The state of the order.

commerceItems.description: The commerce items (sometimes referred to as "line items") represent which actual skus are included in thef order in what quantity, and related information. Please see caution in description of update order. Existing commerce items are matched to input data by externalId, followed by id, followed by catalogRefId. The elements in the commerceItem are instances of CommerceItemImpl.

externalData.description: External data to be associated with a commerce item, provided by a CPQ system.

configuratorId.description: Configuration id for the configurable commerce item.

amount.description: The monetary amount of this order.

priceListId.description: The price list ID used for pricing.

shippingSurcharge.description: Extra handling cost for shipping the product.

currencyCode.description: The currency code for the monetary amounts. A three character currency code such as USD.

quantity.description: The number of items covered by this price info

range.description: Represents which specific items are covered by this price info.

lowBound.description: The lower bound of the range this price info covers, inclusive.

highBound.description: The upper bound of the range this price info covers.

size.description: The number of items in this range, inclusive. (read-only)

detailedUnitPrice.description: The detailed unit price: amount / quantity. (read-only)

updateRobotsFile_request.example:
curl -H 'Content-type: text/plain' -H 'Authorization: Bearer {Access-Token}' -H PUT https://{www.somehost.com}/ccadmin/v1/merchant/robots --data-binary @- <<EOF
User-agent: *
Disallow: /cart
Disallow: /checkout
Disallow: /profile
Disallow: /searchresults
Disallow: /confirmation
Disallow: /wishlist_settings
Disallow: /wishlist

Sitemap: http://{occs-host}/sitemap.xml
EOF

priceListGroupList.description: List of Price List Groups associated with the site including default Price List Group

deleted.description: true if priceListGroup is deleted otherwise false

repositoryId.description: The priceListGroup id associated with the site.

active.description: true if priceListGroup is active otherwise false

id.description: The priceListGroup id associated with site.

recommendationsHost.description: The host name of the recommendations server.

productionURL.description: The production base url for storefront. If set, this base url will be used for any absolute generated links e.g. sitemap urls

timezone.description: The time zone associated with this specific site.

allowedOriginMethods.description: Map of hostname (key) and the allowed http methods (values) for that host.

siteTypes.description: List of site types supported by this site. Each site type has has to be one of the allowed siteType options (case sensitive).

timeToLive.description: The hold price time value in milliseconds.

recommendationsPort.description: The port of the recommendations server

name.description: Site name.

viewedDate.description: Date time when notification was viewed.

createdDate.description: Date time when notification was created.

count.description: 1 for simple notification and >1 for rolled up notification.

details.description: Detailed information formatted as JSON payload..

rootCategories.description: Array of categories associated with the catalog.

dynamicProperty.description: the value of the dynamic property

lastName.description: the last name of the profile

firstName.description: the first name of the profile

profileType.description: This attribute is added for account based commerce. It's value is 'b2b_user'

roles.description: List of role's function that need to associate with the user.

function.description: Function of the role to be assigned.

relativeTo.description: If not provided organization id will be cosidered as its parent organization ID

id.description: Organization ID of the role to be assigned

receiveEmail.description: this is site specific email marketing flag. can be yes or no

dynamicInternalOnlyProperty.description: the value of the internal only dynamic property

active.description: the status of the profile. Should be true or false

parentOrganization.description: This attribute is added for 'Account Based Commerce', this is required only in case of 'Account Based Commerce', this is the id of organization to which user is associated

email.description: the email address of the profile

daytimeTelephoneNumber.description: the phone Number of the profile

secretKey.description: The base64 encoded secret key of the WebHook. A secret key is currently shared between WebHooks of the same name (like "calculateShipping"). The secret key will have a non-null value only if the authentication method was previously chosen as secret key.

availabilityDate.description: Availability date of variant. Date format is an ISO standard such as yyyy-MM-dd.

availabilityStatusMsg.description: Availability status Message of the variant.

availabilityStatus.description: Availability status/ available count of the variant.

type.description: Type of fragment.

text-decoration.description: Text decoration e.g underline, strike through

headers.description: Map of header names and header values

secretKey.description: The base64 encoded secret key of the WebHook. Will be null unless includeSecretKeys query parameter is true. A secret key is currently shared between WebHooks of the same name (like "calculateShipping").

displayName.description: The display name of the WebHook.

serverType.description: The server type of the WebHook.

name.description: The simple name of the WebHook.

url.description: The target URL for the function WebHook.

total.description: Total number of products. Deprecated.

offset.description: Numeric offset of the first order item returned.

limit.description: Limit of number of products.

sort.description: An array that specifies the sort order.

property.description: The name of the property to use for sorting.

order.description: Whether this property should be sorted ascending ("asc") or descending ("dsc").

items.description: Array containing the object representations of orders. See updateOrder for a description of the values of each order.

preorderBackorderEnabled.description: If enabled, allows order to be placed as backordered/preordered. It is recommended to carefully decide to enable or disable the flag at first place. Resetting the flag will lead to inconsistent behavior.

FilterConfigurationsItem.description: The Filter configurations which is updated

billingRegions.description: BillingRegions Codes of the regions selected in the filter option

excludedPromotions.description: List of promotions to be excluded from the current promotion. Item promotions can exclude promotions of type: item, order, shipping. Order promotions can exclude promotion of type order and shipping. Shipping promotions can only exclude another shipping promotions.

parentFolder.description: Map of promotion folder's repository ID key and value. In order to remove the folder assignment, set parentFolder to null e.g. "parentFolder": null

enableConversion.description: Enables promotion data conversion for promotions based on upgraded templates. Default value is 'false'.

shippingMethods.description: Shipping Methods for which the promotion should be applied

example.description: Spend $100 today and get 10% off your order!

headers.description: Map of header names and header values

urls.description: An array of strings of the target URLs for the WebHook.

secretKey.description: The base64 encoded secret key of the WebHook. Will be null unless includeSecretKeys query parameter is true. A secret key is currently shared between WebHooks of the same name (like "submitOrder"). The secret key will have a non-null value only if the authentication method was previously chosen as secret key.

displayName.description: The display name of the WebHook.

serverType.description: The server type of the WebHook.

name.description: The simple name of the WebHook.

applyResendDelayToFirstAttempt.description: Apply resend delay in first attempt

patterns.description: List of user agent string patterns

uiEditorType.description: The UI editor type.Required only while creating and not updating properties.

textSearchable.description: Whether text is searchable or not.

taxPriceInfo.description: The tax pricing details for the order.

cityTax.description: The monetary amount of city tax.

countyTax.description: The monetary amount of county tax.

currencyCode.description: The three character currency code.

countryTax.description: The monetary amount of country tax.

shippingGroups.description: Shipping groups represent shipments and include commerceItemRelationships that represent which commerce items in what quantity are included in the shipment. Shipping groups in a request are matched to existing shipping groups by id, followed by description, followed by (for hardgoodShippingGroups) shippingMethod + address.

description.description: The description of this shipping group. Defaults to the ID.

submittedDate.description: The date the shipping group was submitted.

priceInfo.description: The pricing details about this shipping group.

rawShipping.description: The monitary amount of the cost of raw shipping.

currencyCode.description: The currency code for the monetary amounts.

shipOnDate.description: The date this shipping group is expected to ship upon.

actualShipDate.description: The actual shipped date of this shipping group.

trackingInfo.description: An array that specifies the tracking info of shipping group. (read-only)

specialInstructions.description: Special instructions for the shipping group. Keys and values are strings.

shippingAddress.description: The shipping address for this shipping group.

country.description: Country.

lastName.description: Last name.

address2.description: Address Line 2.

city.description: City.

address1.description: Address Line 1.

companyName.description: Company name.

postalCode.description: Postal code.

county.description: Name of the county.

ownerId.description: The ID of the owner of this address.

firstName.description: First name.

phoneNumber.description: Phone number.

state.description: State.

email.description: The email address

commerceItemRelationships.description: The commerce item relationships are instances of ShippingGroupCommerceItemRelationship that represent how many of which commerce items are included in the order. Please see caution in description of update order. Existing commerce items relationships are matched to input data by id, followed by commerceItemId, followed by commerceItemExternalId.

commerceItemId.description: The referenced commerce item's internal ID.

quantity.description: The quantity of items referenced by this relationship.

relationshipType.description: The type of this relationship. SHIPPINGQUANITY or SHIPPINGQUANTITYREMAINING.

returnedQuantity.description: Number of referenced items that were returned.

commerceItemExternalId.description: The referenced commerce item's external ID.

id.description: The native ID of this item.
The ID of this shipping group.

state.description: The state of this shipping group.

stateDetail.description: Details about the state of this shipping group.

trackingNumber.description: The tracking number. In case of multiple tracking numbers the format should be carrierId-trackingNumber,carrierId-trackingNumber..., Here carrierId is the Id which has been added through the addCarrier end point.

shippingGroupClassType.description: The class type for the ShippingGroup. Currently must be "hardgoodShippingGroup".

priceGroupId.description: The ID of the price group to which the order belongs.

taxExempt.description: Whether order is tax-exempt or not.

sourceSystem.description: The system where the order originated.

lastName.description: Last name.

firstName.description: First name.

shippingAddress.description: Default shipping address

country.description: Country.

phoneNumber.description: Phone number.

address2.description: Address Line 2.

address1.description: Address Line 1.

postalCode.description: Postal code.

county.description: Name of the county.

state.description: State.

email.description: The email address

paymentGroups.description: The array of payment groups represent the payment(s) that paid for the order. Orders when placed will have an instance of a CyberSource TokenizedCreditCard (paymentGroupClassType and paymentMethod of "tokenizedCreditCard"). The paymentGroups property can be updated to include instances of ExternalPaymentGroup (paymentGroupClassType and paymentMethod of "externalPaymentGroup"). ExternalPaymentGroups represent methods of payment that are external and opaque to cloud commerce, and which were taken after the order was initially placed.

expirationYear.description: A string containing the two or four digit year when the credit card expires. (only only for TokenizedCreditCards)

externalType.description: The type in the external system. Might be "StoreCredit", "CreditCard", "Check", etc. (only for ExternalPaymentGroups).

amount.description: The monetary amount of the payment.

externalId.description: The ID for the payment group in an external system (like the OMS)

creditCardType.description: The type of the credit card. (only for TokenizedCreditCards)

expirationMonth.description: A string containing the two digit month when the credit card expires. (only only for TokenizedCreditCards)

submittedDate.description: The date the payment was submitted.

token.description: The CyberSource token string. (only for tokenizedCreditCard)

IIN.description: The issuer identification number (first 6 digits) of the credit card.

paymentGroupClassType.description: The class type of the payment group. Currently supported values are "tokenizedCreditCard" and "externalPaymentGroup".

creditCardNumber.description: The last four digits of the credit card number. (only for TokenizedCreditCards)

externalSubtype.description: The subtype in the external system. Might be "VISA" for a PaymentGroup with an external type of "CreditCard". (only for ExternalPaymentGroups)

paymentMethod.description: The payment method. Currently supported values are "tokenizedCreditCard" and "externalPaymentGroup".

externalSourceId.description: The external source ID, limited to 6 characters. (only for ExternalPaymentGroups)

id.description: The internal ID of the payment group.

state.description: The state of this payment group.

stateDetail.description: Details about the state of this payment group.

currencyCode.description: The three character currency code. For example: USD.

expirationDayOfMonth.description: A string containing the two digit day of month when the credit card expires. (only only for TokenizedCreditCards)

salesChannel.description: The sales channel of this order. default to "default".

shippingGroupCount.description: The number of shipping groups (read-only, value is ignored when updating).

locale.description: The locale in which order submitted.

paymentGroupCount.description: The number of payment groups. (read-only, value is ignored when updating)

priceInfo.description: Pricing information, an instance of OrderPriceInfo.

total.description: The monetary total: amount + shipping + tax. (read-only)

manualAdjustmentTotal.description: The monetary total of manual adjustments.

discountAmount.description: The monetary amount of the discount: rawSubtotal - amount + manualAdjustmentTotal. (read-only)

currencyCode.description: The three character currency code for the monetary amounts.

profileId.description: The ID of the shopper profile that owns the order.

siteId.description: The ID of the site on which the order was placed.

totalCommerceItemCount.description: The total count of commerce items in the order. (read-only)

state.description: The state of the order.

commerceItems.description: The commerce items (sometimes referred to as "line items") represent which actual skus are included in thef order in what quantity, and related information. Please see caution in description of update order. Existing commerce items are matched to input data by externalId, followed by id, followed by catalogRefId. The elements in the commerceItem are instances of CommerceItemImpl.

externalId.description: An optional, external ID for this commerce item.

externalData.description: External data to be associated with a commerce item, provided by a CPQ system.

values.description: The array of values associated with an externalData item.

dynamic_property_key.description: This property's name and value will be retrieved from a CPQ system, so will be dynamically set.

actionCode.description: The action code that has been set on the externalData item by the CPQ system.

catalogRefId.description: The reference ID of the catalog this commerce item references. Typically the SKU id.

configuratorId.description: Configuration id for the configurable commerce item.

amount.description: The monetary amount of this order.

priceListId.description: The price list ID used for pricing.

shippingSurcharge.description: Extra handling cost for shipping the product.

currencyCode.description: The currency code for the monetary amounts. A three character currency code such as USD.

quantity.description: The number of items covered by this price info

range.description: Represents which specific items are covered by this price info.

lowBound.description: The lower bound of the range this price info covers, inclusive.

highBound.description: The upper bound of the range this price info covers.

size.description: The number of items in this range, inclusive. (read-only)

detailedUnitPrice.description: The detailed unit price: amount / quantity. (read-only)

currencyCode.description: The three character currency code for the monetary amounts.

listPrice.description: The monetary amount of the list price.

catalogId.description: The ID of the catalog which this commerce item references.

productDisplayName.description: The product's display name. (read-only, obtained from the referenced product)

changeItemIds.description: Array of change item IDs to store.

country.description: The country of the location.

hours.description: The store opening hours. Only applicable to location type 'store'.

distance.description: A session-scoped property that contains the distance when searching for location items. Not applicable.

address3.description: The third address field of the location.

endDate.description: The end date for the location. This is used when performing a search for inventory available from a store during a specific date range. If the search contains a specific date range, only locations that have a date that are contained within that date range will be displayed.

address2.description: The second address field of the location.

city.description: The city of the location.

address1.description: The first address field of the location.

postalCode.description: The postal code of the location.

county.description: The county of the location.

sites.description: List of sites.  A location can be constrained to a list of sites. If no site is defined, the location is available on all sites.

repositoryId.description: The site ID associated with this location.

type.description: The type of location, either 'location' or 'store'.

externalLocationId.description: An optional additional location ID, such as the merchant store ID. Use this if you have extra parameters for identifying your stores or locations.

phoneNumber.description: The phone number of the location.

siteGroups.description: List of site groups. A location can be constrained to a list of site groups. If no site group is defined, the location is available on all sites.

repositoryId.description: The site group ID associated with this location.

locationId.description: The ID of the location. This ID will be generated if none is provided.

repositoryId.description: The ID of the location repository item.

name.description: The name of the location.

faxNumber.description: The fax number of the location.

startDate.description: The start date for the location. This is used when performing a search for inventory available from a store during a specific date range. If the search contains a specific date range, only locations that have a date that are contained within that date range will be displayed.

email.description: The email address of the location.

remorsePeriodHours.description: Remorse period time in hours. Needed to specify when remorse period is enabled.

isRemorsePriod.description: Tells whether remorse period is enabled or not.

remorsePeriodMinutes.description: Remorse period time in minutes(apart from the hours set). Needed to specify when remorse period is enabled.

url.description: ID of the timezone item

shippingCalculator.description: A valid key for the available calculator types.

eligibleForProductWithSurcharges.description: Whether this shipping method is enabled for products with surcharges or not. Defaults to false.

ranges.description: The price ranges for this shipping method.

high.description: The upper boundary of the range.

amount.description: The monetary value for the range.

low.description: The lower boundary of the range.

deleted.description: If the price list deleted

active.description: If the price list group is active.

id.description: The id of the price list group.

displayName.description: The display name for the shipping method given the current locale.

type.description: The type of shipping method

taxCode.description: A valid tax code for calculating tax on shipping.

shippingGroupType.description: The shipping group type for the shipping method.

enabled.description: Whether this shipping method is enabled or not.

displaySequence.description: Used to determine the ordering of shipping methods in the UI. Lower values should appear first in any ordered list.

repositoryId.description: The repository ID shipping method item.

name.description: The internal name for the shipping method.

shipToLocations.description: The Shipping Regions for a Shipping Method

repositoryId.description: The repository ID of the shipping region.

op.description: Set to partial for a partial/incremental index, or set to baseline for a baseline index.

onlyIfIdle.description: If true, will never queue a background index.

errorInfo.description: Error note for failure of this quote

items.description: Report data for detailedOrderMetrics. Properties in the response are dynamically generated, will change depending upon the reportId.

includedTax.description: The value of the tax (if tax is inclusive) applied to the orders submitted.

netRevenue.description: The total amount received as a result of orders submitted. Net Revenue consists of the Gross Revenue from your sales orders as well as shipping and tax revenue. Promotional discounts are then subtracted to provide this figure.

unitsSold.description: Number of Items/units sold in the orders submitted.

averageOrderValue.description: The average value obtained for the orders submitted.

promotionalDiscount.description: The value of the promotional discounts applied to the orders submitted.

averageOrderMarkdownDiscount.description: The average value of the Markdown Discounts applied to the orders submitted.

grossRevenue.description: The amount of revenue gained from items sold for orders submitted. Gross Revenue excludes tax, shipping revenue and any promotional discounts applied to the order. It is calculated using the price a customer paid, regardless of whether this was the full list price or sale price.

markdownDiscount.description: The value of the discounts applied to orders submitted as a result of items/units being sold at a markdown price. Promotional discounts are not included.

averageOrderPromotionalDiscount.description: The average value of the Promotional Discounts that were applied to the orders submitted.

shipping.description: The value of the shipping charges applied to the orders submitted.

fullListPrice.description: The total list price of items sold. Full List Price revenue excludes tax, shipping revenue and any promotional or markdown discounts applied to the order.

excludedTax.description: The value of the tax (if tax is exclusive) applied to the orders submitted.

averageOrderGrossRevenue.description: The average value of the Gross Revenue obtained for the orders submitted.

orders.description: The Number of Orders submitted (where a payment has been authorized/approved/successfully processed).

averageOrderSize.description: The average number of items/units sold contained in the orders submitted.

schedule.description: It contains schedule information of scheduled job.

scheduleType.description: Schedule type could be periodic or calendar

itemRepriceAllowed.description: Indicates whether to reprice all cart items during edit order or to reprice cart items having quantity change. If 'ItemRepriceAllowed' flag is set to true, all cart items not having overridden price will be repriced during order edit. Else only cart items having a quantity change or newly added cart items will be repriced. This flag doesn't have any significance in create order.

itemPriceOverrideAllowedForCreate.description: Indicates whether item price can be overridden while creating an order.

itemPriceOverrideAllowed.description: Indicates whether item price can be overridden while amending an order.

totalResults.description: The total number of audiences that match the supplied filter.

offset.description: The starting index of the returned audiences.

limit.description: Maximum number of audiences to be fetched.

sort.description: The sort used for the returned audiences.

property.description: The property sorted on.

order.description: The sort order: either asc or desc.

useInReports.description: Indicates if this audience will be used in reporting.

deleted.description: Indicates if this audience is deleted.

rules.description: The array of rules that are contained in the rule set.

property.description: The property to be evaluated.

category.description: The category of the property, i.e. the user profile.

value.description: The value used to compare against the property value to determine the rule result.  Values can be strings, integers, doubles, floats, JSON objects or JSON arrays depending on the operator and how the property was described in the audienceRuleProperty endpoint.

operator.description: The operator applied to the rule property.
The operator applied to all of the rules in the rule set.

enabled.description: Indicates if this audience is enabled.

propertiesOrder.description: List of properties in ascending order

properties.description: List of user-defined properties for order type keyed by property name.

default.description: Default property value of order type.

textSearchable.description: Whether text is searchable or not.

type.description: Data type of property.

default.description: Default editable attribute.

textSearchable.description: Whether property is searchable or not.

required.description: Whether it is required or not.

multiSelect.description: whether multi-select search facet or not.

required.description: Whether it is required or not.

multiSelect.description: whether multi-select search facet or not

delegateApprovalManagement.description: This flag indicates if the delegated admin has the provision of approval management, if set merchant admin cannot do any approval management.

secondaryAddresses.description: List of all the addresses associated with an Organization, if property like 'isDefaultShippingAddress' or 'isDefaultBillingAddress' is set to 'true', then in response the same address will come as a separate attribute with name 'shippingAddress' or 'billingAddress'.

country.description: The country of the address

phoneNumber.description: Phone Number of the address

address2.description: The address2 of the secondary address

city.description: The city of the secondary address

tags.name: Profile Context List
tags.description: Profile Context List Endpoints. A profileContextList has a ordered profileContexts property. Each profileContext in the list corresponds to a boolean property (such as an audience) on the profile. If the current shopper's profile has a true value for that boolean property, then the profileContext may be active. The first profileContext in the list that corresponds to a true shopper's profile property is the active profileContext. Currently, only a single ProfileContextList is supported, and it only applies to B2C shoppers. A profileContext can specify priceListGroups and a catalog that apply to shoppers in that profileContext.
